spec_match.rationale: Lays out all four publisher×advertiser 3PC combinations with both pre-130 and post-130 behaviour. The leak narrative (one-sided cookie + debug key = cross-side identifier join) is technically accurate.

interactive.rationale: Era toggle, clickable matrix cells, diagram repaints per cell with stepped narrative, and the generated report JSON updates with each selected state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises 2x2 matrix with per-cell explanation of the cross-side identifier leak and the strip rule — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: All four cells covered including the never-leaked case (both 3PC blocked), the safe case (both 3PC allowed), and both one-sided reverse-direction leak paths.

references.rationale: chromestatus link plus spec PR link — good.

design_system.rationale: Cell backgrounds, legend swatches, and helper text now use classes backed by CSS variables and color-mix instead of inline style attributes or raw hex literals.

summary: The leakage matrix now keeps its styling within the local design-system rules and exposes the concrete report JSON for every publisher/advertiser cookie-state cell.
